name: Clara Pipeline A — Demo Call to Agent v1

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Click 'Test workflow' to start Pipeline A. In production, swap this for a Watch Folder node.

nodes.name: Set Config
nodes.notes: Set paths to your dataset and scripts. Adjust dataset_path if your folder is in a different location.

nodes.name: List Demo Files
nodes.notes: Lists all .txt transcript files in the demo folder. Output is a newline-separated list of file paths.

nodes.name: Split File List
nodes.notes: Splits the newline-separated file list into individual items. Each item downstream = one transcript file.

nodes.name: Clean File Paths
nodes.notes: Cleans up the file path strings and filters out any empty lines from the find command output.

nodes.name: Run Pipeline A (per file)
nodes.notes: Runs your Python pipeline for one transcript file. Calls normalize → extract → prompt_generator → write_outputs → supabase → github.

nodes.name: Parse Result
nodes.notes: Parses the Python script stdout to extract account_id, company name, and GitHub issue URL for logging.

nodes.name: Success or Error?
nodes.notes: Routes to success path (true) or error logging path (false) based on Python script exit code.

nodes.name: Log Success
nodes.notes: Logs successful processing. In production, you could send a Slack message or email here.

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Appends error details to /data/logs/errors.jsonl. Does NOT stop the workflow — other files continue processing.

nodes.name: Batch Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from all files and prints a final summary. This node runs after all files are processed.
